calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Amended Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Jun-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR. Debbie Neville
Petitioner, Michiko Fukumoto present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Michico Kaneshima.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-30-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Lee Batara.
No appearances by parties, case is taken off-calendar.
